title: Vestoria - A Journey Anew
description:
Vestoria is a vanilla-style survival overhaul focused on atmosphere, exploration, and natural progression.
Overgrown ruins and scattered remnants whisper of a forgotten world, but there is no path—only the one you create.

A Journey Anew.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0dbe060946fa99e1b490e42625c8f986a8f3ae65.png)

# Welcome to Vestoria - A Journey Anew

> The world is alive—its forests vast, its villages thriving. But beneath the surface, quiet traces linger.
> 
> Dust-covered remnants in the earth. Hidden halls deep below.
> Signs of something... or someone, long forgotten.
> 
> There are no clear answers—only echoes in the stone.
> No story to follow, just a sense that the land remembers more than it shows.
> 
> This may just be - **a journey anew**.

![Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d60e2015aaffce112b67282f58a31705036ce447_0.webp)

> ### **Things to know when playing:** 
> Game may lag initially when loading into a world, but should be a smooth experience after.\
> Distant Horizons is on by default at at 32 render distance.\
> Bliss shaders are on by default and is recommended due to being most performant.

**Vestoria** is an overhaul of the vanilla Minecraft experience. Built for those who love survival, discovery, and the quiet beauty of a living world, it attempts to preserve the original mechanics of Minecraft while expanding on what makes exploration feel meaningful.

There’s no story to follow. There are no quests. No tech trees or cluttered systems.
Just you, the wild, and the journey ahead.

Whether you're a veteran or a newcomer, Vestoria invites you to experience Minecraft in a way that feels both familiar and quietly new while maintaining strong performance through optimized settings, and support for Distant Horizons.

![Recommended Specs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3964a0569c9c91004f60bea2a2d65cf856975378_0.webp)
**Default settings, 120FPS:**
- CPU : i5-10400
- GPU : AMD RX 6600
- Allocated RAM : 10GB

![Links](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/353aa67c59e02f92fd06e3fe30d6e326fb542b86_0.webp)

Bliss Shaders:
> [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/shader/bliss-shader) (Non Distant Horizons)\
> [Github](https://github.com/X0nk/Bliss-Shader) (Distant Horizons)
